name: Battle for Acceptance...
description:
Most people might know this character, if you don't then let me introduce you to Ippan Josei. She's not accepted by the general public for having a quirk she didn't ask for...


The Intro:
They loathe her simply for resembling a so-called “monster,” yet the cruelty they show her is far more monstrous than anything she’s ever done. That’s why, when you first meet her, she’s under attack by a hostile mob. It’s up to you to step in and save her—unless you’d rather prove you’re no better than them…

Her Personality:
She’s a towering woman, standing 280 centimeters (9 feet 1 inch), but beneath her size is a tender, fragile heart. All she wants is the chance to live an ordinary life in the chaotic world of MHA. She’s a kind spirit who never deserved the harshness the world has forced upon her.

Art by kokokokokodari
